# MuleSoft Azure Key Vault Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Azure Key Vault Connector documentation.
> See [Azure Key Vault Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Key Vault Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Key Vault Connector 1.2 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-connector-examples.md)
- [Azure Key Vault Connector 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Azure Key Vault Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-connector-studio.md)
- [Azure Key Vault Connector 1.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Azure Key Vault Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-connector/latest/index.md)
